race.description: Kerry Clarke Fillies & Mares Ffa Ms Pace (G3)
race.comment: FAKENIT (2) found winning form when she led and kept going to salute by 2.7m at this circuit and distance last month then drew wider and did some work but fought well for a second last week. Has the speed to take advantage of the good draw. Take beating. EASTBRO CHRISSY (3) has won both outings since crossing from Victoria for this campaign. Overcame a second row draw when fresh at Pinjarra then led and proved too speedy for FAKENIT at this circuit and distance last week. Draws outside that rival this time but hard to knock what she has done in the west so far. AARDIEBYTHESEASIDE NZ (5) has had little go to plan of late but was racing well prior. Draws lower than in recent outings so could bounce back to her best. ALTA ALLURE (4) is a first four chance.
